rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Next.js Pages Router type checks fail if a page component lacks a default export; always export default for pages/*.tsx files","scope":"src/pages"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Hotfix pipeline runs build→verify(skip tests)→ship, bypassing taskify/plan/review stages entirely","scope":"pipeline"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"The @kody hotfix command does not exist; valid aliases are full, rerun, fix, fix-ci, review, resolve, status","scope":"kody CLI"}]}
